project_overview.project_name: Livestock and Fisheries Sector Development Project (LFSDP)
project_overview.project_development_objective: Increase productivity and commercialization of producers and processors in selected value chains, strengthen service delivery systems in the livestock and fisheries sectors, and respond promptly and effectively to an eligible crisis or emergency
project_overview.total_financing: SDR 121.1 million (US$170 million equivalent) IDA Credit plus US$6.2 million counterpart funding
project_overview.beneficiaries: 1.2 million households (466,000 from sub-projects, 735,000 from improved services), smallholder livestock and fisheries producers, processors, women-headed households, unemployed youth

primary_locations: Southern Nations Nationalities and Peoples Region (SNNPR)
geographic_scope.coverage_type: regional - focused on high potential highland regions plus Gambella for fisheries
geographic_scope.fragile_or_conflict_affected_areas: partial - includes Gambella and Benishangul-Gumuz regions which have experienced instability; project includes screening for interface with Commune Development Program

key_components.component_name: Linking More Productive Farmers to Markets
key_components.description: Support productivity increase and commercialization through sub-projects targeting different levels of producers (subsistence, improved, specialized)
Build capacity of Ministry of Livestock and Fisheries, develop strategic national programs, improve service delivery systems

key_components.component_name: Project Coordination, Monitoring and Evaluation, and Knowledge Management
key_components.description: Support project coordination, management, monitoring and evaluation, and learning needs

implementation_arrangements.coordination_mechanisms: Project Coordination Units at federal, regional and Woreda levels; Project Steering Committees and Technical Committees at all levels
implementation_arrangements.procurement_approach: World Bank Procurement Regulations for IPF Borrowers; mix of international and national competitive bidding
implementation_arrangements.monitoring_and_evaluation: Progress and Results Information Monitoring System (PRIMS); baseline, mid-term and end-of-project surveys; quarterly reporting

identified_risks.risk_description: Political unrest in 2016, state of emergency, ethnic tensions between regions
identified_risks.mitigation_measures: Strong participatory development models, transparency measures, enhanced safeguards operational steps

identified_risks.risk_description: New ministry with limited capacity in procurement, financial management, safeguards, and implementation
identified_risks.mitigation_measures: Comprehensive capacity building strategy, systematic training, technical assistance through ATA and UN agencies

identified_risks.risk_description: Limited experience in World Bank procurement procedures, staff turnover, weak internal audit
identified_risks.mitigation_measures: Procurement manual preparation, staff recruitment and training, independent procurement auditor engagement

identified_risks.risk_description: Potential overlap with Commune Program in Gambella, land acquisition issues, inclusion of vulnerable groups
identified_risks.mitigation_measures: Cautious screening approach, comprehensive safeguards instruments (ESMF, RPF, Social Assessment), grievance redress mechanisms

safeguards_and_social.grievance_redress_mechanism: yes - multi-tiered system using existing state structures (Public Grievance Hearing Offices, Ethiopian Institute of Ombudsman) plus traditional dispute settlement institutions
safeguards_and_social.gender_considerations: 30% women participation target, Gender and Youth Officer in Federal PCU, women-friendly training arrangements, household methodology approach
vulnerable_groups: ethnic minorities (Negede, Berta, Agnywa, Majenger, Gamo, Zeyse)

fcv_relevant_details.conflict_sensitivity: Project includes screening checklist for interface with Commune Development Program; participatory approaches to reduce tensions; attention to ethnic minorities and vulnerable groups
fcv_relevant_details.fragility_context: Implementation in regions with history of ethnic tensions (Gambella, Benishangul-Gumuz); recent political unrest and state of emergency (lifted August 2017); weak institutional capacity of new ministry
fcv_relevant_details.security_considerations: Contingent Emergency Response Component included for crisis response; monitoring of political situation and ethnic tensions
fcv_relevant_details.displacement_or_refugees: no specific mention of refugees, but project includes provisions for land acquisition and resettlement through Resettlement Policy Framework
